firmware.title: Apple //e
firmware.author: Mikhail Matveev, DnCraptor
firmware.description: Apple IIe emulator with full 65C02 CPU running on RP2350. The Apple II, introduced in 1977 by Steve Wozniak, was one of the first mass-produced personal computers and a cornerstone of the home computing revolution. Supports all video modes including Text, Lo-Res, Hi-Res, and Double Hi-Res. Loads DSK, NIB, WOZ, and BDSK disk images from SD card with write-back support. Based on the MII emulator by Michel Pollet.
firmware.controls: PS/2 or USB keyboard. NES/USB gamepad. F11: disk UI. Open/Closed Apple via Alt/Win keys. Joystick via numpad.
